context: Hampton's Rest B&B — staff and owner reimbursement policy for business expenses

validation_rules.notes: Receipts required for all amounts over €10
validation_rules.rule: All reimbursable expenses must be accompanied by original VAT receipts
Expenses over €150 require advance approval from the business owner

validation_rules.notes: Applies to all personal non-business purchases

validation_rules.rule: Business mileage reimbursed at Revenue approved rate (€0.2646/km for first 1,500 km)
B&B consumables (linen, toiletries, breakfast provisions) reimbursable with supplier invoice
